metaTitle: Post-Surgery Recovery Bracing & Cold Therapy | Avana Surgical
metaDescription: Doctor-recommended post-operative bracing, cold therapy and rehab support for knee, shoulder, hip, ankle and spine surgery patients.

hero.title: The recovery your surgery deserves.
hero.description: What happens in the first 12 weeks after surgery shapes the rest of your recovery. Pain control, motion protection, and the right brace at the right time make a real difference.

conditionsHeading.title: What good post-op support actually looks like
conditionsHeading.lead: Modern post-op recovery has three pillars — bracing, cold therapy, and progression.

conditions.title: Cold therapy + compression
conditions.description: Powered cold therapy with active compression reduces post-op pain and swelling significantly — often cutting opioid use.

conditions.title: Controlled immobilisation
conditions.description: Many surgeries — shoulder, hip, certain knee procedures — need the joint protected from harmful motion while it heals.

conditions.title: Hinged range-of-motion
conditions.description: Hinged bracing lets your surgeon precisely control how much your joint moves at each stage of recovery.

conditions.title: Safe weight-bearing
conditions.description: Walkers and functional braces help you weight-bear safely while bone, ligament, or tendon healing completes.

productsHeading.title: Trusted post-op solutions
productsHeading.lead: Equipment widely used in Indian operating theatres and post-op clinics — likely the same support your surgeon recommends.

testimonials.name: Walid Abedin
testimonials.testimonial: I had ACL reconstruction and the pain was unimaginable. The combination of cold therapy and compression in this product is game changing. Pain reduced after just two uses.

testimonials.name: Senthil
testimonials.testimonial: Reduced my pain and inflammation considerably and helped me recover faster after surgery.

seoContent.title: What good post-op recovery looks like
seoContent.intro: Surgery is one half of getting better — recovery is the other half. The equipment you use in those first weeks matters more than most patients realise.

sections.heading: Pain control is more than pills
sections.body: Powered cold therapy with active compression has been shown to reduce post-operative pain medication needs and speed return-to-function. Better pain control means earlier movement, which means better recovery.

sections.heading: Protect what was repaired
sections.body: An ACL graft, a rotator cuff repair, or a new hip joint is fragile in early recovery. Correctly-prescribed bracing keeps the joint within safe limits — preventing the setbacks that lead to re-operation.

sections.heading: Progression — not just protection
sections.body: Modern hinged braces let your surgeon dial in exactly how much motion you should have each week. As healing progresses, the brace lets you do more — until you don't need it any more.

seoContent.disclaimer: Educational content. Always follow your surgeon's specific recovery instructions.

faq.question: Is cold therapy really better than ice packs?
faq.answer: For most post-op situations, yes. Powered cold therapy with active compression maintains consistent temperature, provides circulating compression that reduces swelling, and doesn't require constant refreshing.

faq.question: How long do I wear a post-op brace?
faq.answer: It depends on the procedure. Most post-op braces are worn continuously for 4–6 weeks then weaned over the next 6–12 weeks. Follow your surgeon's specific protocol.

faq.question: Can I rent rather than buy?
faq.answer: For some short-term post-op equipment (e.g. cold therapy units) rental is an option. Speak to our team about what makes sense for your specific recovery.

cta.title: Make your recovery smooth from day one.
cta.description: Talk to our team about what your surgeon has prescribed — we'll help you get the right product, properly fitted, in time for your recovery.
cta.disclaimer: All products dispatched by Osteokart.com — Avana's authorised retail partner.
